global_description: A small, compact songbird with a rounded body and short tail. It has olive-green upperparts and white underparts, with a distinctive white eye-ring. The wings are grayish with two white wing bars, and the bill is short and pointed.

part_details.eye_ring: Prominent white circle around the eye, contrasting with the olive head.
part_details.wings: Grayish with two distinct white bars, medium length.
part_details.tail: Short, slightly rounded, matching olive-green upperparts.
part_details.underparts: White, smooth texture, contrasting with upperparts.

spatial_relations: The white eye-ring encircles the eye on the olive-green head.
The grayish wings are positioned laterally on the body with white bars.
The short tail extends from the rear of the body.
